caption: A person wearing a white smartwatch on their left wrist is working at a white wooden craft table. The workspace features a grey cutting mat, a metal paper trimmer, a white ink pad labeled "MEMENTO", and clear stamp blocks, one of which reads "Thank You". In the initial sequence, the person uses both hands to carefully align a piece of brown cardstock against the edge of the paper trimmer. As the action progresses, they maintain their grip on the brown paper, preparing it for a cut. Finally, the brown cardstock is replaced by a square piece of patterned paper featuring a dark green background with small yellow and white flowers. The person holds this patterned sheet in place over the trimmer. A logo in the bottom left corner of each frame reads "Stamping Jill" next to a small heart icon.
